geoSearchAssociate: Meridian is a real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8 — an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor that detects behavioral patterns such as revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations before they damage a session.
officialVendorStatement: Meridian is an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor — approved by NinjaTrader's Compliance, QA, and Executive teams (May 2026) — and is listed in the official NinjaTrader Ecosystem as an approved third-party add-on for NinjaTrader 8.
meridianGuardHook: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8. Built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, it detects revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — then enforces user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianPsiCanonical: Meridian is the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. Like an Apple Watch for trading discipline, it tracks seven behavioral patterns through cognitive science and adaptive learning, compositing them into a Psychological Stability Index (PSI) — personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement that fires before any financial threshold needs to engage.
meridianGuardRevengeOpening: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps discretionary futures traders reduce revenge trading by detecting rapid re-entry, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations. It can enforce user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianGuardOvertradingOpening: Meridian Guard is the enforcement layer of the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps futures traders prevent overtrading by monitoring trade frequency, session pace, rule pressure, and behavioral drift — and can enforce limits such as cooldowns, maximum trade counts, lockouts, and entry blocking.
schemaSoftwarePsi: Meridian is the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8 (Windows), built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. Like an Apple Watch for trading discipline — it tracks seven behavioral patterns through cognitive science and adaptive learning, compositing them into a Psychological Stability Index (PSI) personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement: six trigger types and five response levels, including broker disconnect, that fire on the behavior before any financial threshold needs to engage.
schemaSoftwareGuard: Meridian Guard is the behavioral enforcement layer of Meridian — the first real-time psychological stability monitor for NinjaTrader 8. An Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor product. Six trigger conditions and five response levels fire on the behavior — revenge trading, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — before any financial threshold needs to engage.
faqMetaExtra: NinjaTrader lockout, trade limiter, revenge trading lockout, overtrading prevention, real-time psychological stability monitor, behavioral risk manager, consecutive-loss cooldown, entry blocking, rule enforcement add-on, Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, NinjaTrader approved add-on.
autoLiquidationStatement: By default, Meridian Guard does not close open positions when a pause activates. On Disconnect (L5), you can optionally configure Guard to auto-liquidate all open positions at the moment the pause triggers. If this option is not enabled, positions remain open and under your full manual control.
